summary: Frontend visual-update iteration tested. All 12 routes render without errors. grid-bg/grid-bg-light classes are completely removed (0 occurrences in DOM and source). Split hero layouts (lg:grid-cols-2) verified on Home, Solutions, all 5 SolutionDetail pages, DEXA, and Subsidiaries with text on left and images on right at desktop. Each solution detail page loads its own unique solutionImages-mapped image (healthcare/insurance/fintech/ai/company-operating). Dark hero sections show subtle blue radial glow (depth-dark gradient) instead of grids. Mobile (390x844) correctly stacks text first, image second. Navigation dropdown (7 items), contact form validation (4 errors on empty submit), and animated counters (e.g., 2,499+) still work. NOTE: review_request listed wrong slugs (talent-acquisition, learning-development, etc.) — actual slugs are healthcare-/insurance-/fintech-/ai-/company-operating-infrastructure; SolutionDetail correctly redirects unknown slugs to /solutions via <Navigate>.

issues: Browser tab title still says 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of a Mentor Global brand title (public/index.html). Minor branding miss.

action_items: Optional: Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'Mentor Global | Health Fintech Infrastructure' for branding consistency.

Optional: review_request originally listed obsolete solution slugs (talent-acquisition, learning-development, leadership-coaching, organizational-design, diversity-inclusion); actual slugs in content.js are healthcare/insurance/fintech/ai/company-operating-infrastructure. No code change needed but worth noting for future test runs.
critical_code_review_comments: SolutionDetail.jsx: solutionImages map is keyed by slug — good. Fallback uses healthcare-infrastructure image for any unknown slug (line 53). Acceptable, but combining with the Navigate redirect on unknown slug means the fallback never triggers in practice — fine.
Home.jsx is 380+ lines with 4 separate split-grid sections; consider extracting reusable <SplitHero/> and <SplitSection/> components to keep file <300 lines.
All hero images load from images.unsplash.com without preconnect link — adding <link rel=preconnect href=https://images.unsplash.com> in index.html would shave ~100-200ms off LCP.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mentor Global is a pure frontend (no backend APIs) site. Routes: /, /solutions, /solutions/{healthcare,insurance,fintech,ai,company-operating}-infrastructure, /dexa, /subsidiaries, /about, /team, /contact. Grid backgrounds were removed in this iteration; CSS now uses .depth-dark and .depth-light gradients (App.css lines 61+). Split hero layouts use `grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2`. Mobile stacks text first then image (verified at 390x844). All hero unsplash images render successfully. Contact form has working client-side validation. Counters animate on scroll on Home (Scale section, value 2,499+ observed).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Visual update iteration is fully successful.
